title: Here’s Where the U.S. and Iran Have Launched Attacks as the War Escalates
summary_full: The U.S. military has appeared to widen its targets in Iran, while Iran has fired at bases belonging to American allies in the Middle East.
summary_public: The U.S. military has appeared to widen its targets in Iran, while Iran has fired at bases belonging to American allies in the Middle East.
